titleStmt.title: SII 39.23: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 23. (A.R. No. 23 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE. MĀṞAVARMAṈ ALIAS TRIBHUVA[NA CHAKRAVARTIN]-KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA, WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL COUNTRIES, 26th YEAR [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of barren land by Chakravarti Sōmaṉ Koṟṟaṉ and others of the ūrār of Kurumpaṟṟaṅguḍi (near) Illañjēri in Maṟittulagaṅgāttapāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple, and subsequently they made provision for irrigation facilities. At the end of the record mentions the signatories like Avaiyaṉ, Pokkaṉ-ponnaṉ. Srirāmadēvaṉ, Alaṅgāraṉ Iḷaiya Perumāḷ-Eḍuttakai-Aḻagiyār etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṟkittikku mel śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu paṅkūṉi mātam 2 10 4- ntiṉ tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu tiruccaṉṉavaṉattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉam Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Ādicaṇḍeśvara nāyaṉārkku maṟittulakaṅkātta pāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Illañcerikkuṭiku kuṟumpaṟṟaṅkuṭi Ūrukkuc camainta vāricakravattiyum comaṉ koṟṟaṉum pokkaṉ po
ṉṉaṉum Eḻumpotu Avaiyaṉum Ivvilai piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ Ivarkku viṟṟa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟ kellai nūṟaṉ viṭaṅkaṉ keṇikku kiḻai pokkaṉ poṉṉar taṭṭāṉcey mel varampuccevaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kuṭivayal toppil vaṭakkil velikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai Innāyaṉār ṉam mañcaṭ ceykkīḻ varampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai comaṉ koṟṟaṉ nāvaltoṭṭatti
l teṉvelikkum vāricakravattināval toṭṭattil teṉvelikkum cūraṉviṭaṅkaṉ nāval toṭṭattil teṉvelikku teṟkkum Āka Icainta peru nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nilamum keṇiyum Ivvellaikkuḷḷu meṉokkiya maramum kīḻ nokkiya kiṇaṟum Ivvellaikkuṭpaṭṭaṉa Eppeṟpaṭṭa cuvātāntriyaṅkaḷum Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷukku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutto
m Uṭaiyār caṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkovilil Ādicaṇḍeśvara nāyaṉāṟkku kuṟumpaṟṟaṅkuṭikku camaintavāri cakravattiyum comaṉ koṟṟaṉum pokkaṉ poṉṉaṉum Eḻumpotu Avaiyaṉum Ivvellaikkuḷ paṭṭa nilattukkum keṇikkum Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷ ø2 10 Ippaṇam Irupatum Āvaṇakkaḷatte Eṅkaḷūr kaṭamaikku Uṭaiyār virāṭarāyar vacam kuṭuppittu viṟṟuk kuṭutto Ivvellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
nilattukkum keṇikkum Ituve vilaiyolaiyum poruḷ cilavolaiyumāvatākavum Itu vallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ cilavolai kāṇavuṅ kāṭṭavum kaṭavatallavākavum Oru kālāvatu Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatu Ōlaikkuṟṟamc coṟkuṟṟa muṇṭākilum kuṟṟamalla Āvatākavum Innilam mututaricākaiyāl keṇi melkaraikku meṟku vayakki viḷainilamākki payir ceytu koḷvārkaḷākavum Ikkeṇi
yil nir Ivarkku veṇṭun tevatāṉattil viṭṭuk koḷvārkaḷākavum kuṟumpaṟṟaṅkuṭik kaḷattil nirvayakkiṉa nilaṅkaḷukkum muṉpu tevatāṉamāṉamañcaḷ ceypaṟṟukkum nir pāccik koḷvārkaḷākavum nirpāyum Iṭattu Opāniyiṭṭuppāccum potu Innilaṅkaḷil puravu viḻukkāṭu pāyvatākavum periyamaṭaiyāle Āḻvāṉ piṭāraṉ taṭṭāṉ cey kiḻvaramparuke koṭupontu pāccik koḷvārkaḷākavum vākkalukku veṇ
ṭum nilam viṭuvomākavum Innilattukku kaṭamai kuṭimai Eṉṟu collak kaṭavatallavākavum kuḷattevai puṟavuviḻukkāṭṭile ceyvārkaḷākavum Ipparicurappaṭiyile kalveṭṭik koḷvārkaḷākavum vilai niccayitta ø2 10 Itil mañcaḷ ceykku nirpāykiṟa viḻukkāṭṭukkup pattu paṇam vilaipporuḷāvatākavum keṇikkum mututaricukkum pattuppaṇam vilaipporuḷāvatākavum Ippaṭikku candradityavat Iṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyā
ka Aṉupavippārkaḷāka viṟṟu vilaip pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār caṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār kovilil Ādicaṇḍeśvara nāyaṉārkku kuṟumpaṟṟaṅkuṭikkuc camainta vāricakravattiyum comaṉ koṟṟaṉum pokkaṉ poṉṉaṉum Eḻumpotu Avaiyaṉum Ippaṭikku vāricakravattiyāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira peraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu comaṉ koṟṟaṉ taṟkuṟiyum Eḻumpo
tu Avaiyaṉ taṟkuṟiyum Iṭṭu Ippaṭikku nāṉum Aṟiveṉ ciṅkapporumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pokkaṉ poṉṉaṉ taṟkuṟiyum Iṭṭu nāṉum Aṟiveṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai kirāmatevaṉ Alaṅkārar Eḻuttu Inta vilai pramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr kaṇakku poyyiluṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyaperumāḷ Eṭuttakaiy Aḻakiyār Eḻuttu Itu māheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 39.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
